seo__on-page-optimization-silver.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What’s the difference between optimizing an existing page and creating a new one?

If you have a page that’s already live but needs work (thin content, missing tags, broken links), we’ll optimize it. If you need a brand new page built from scratch (say, a service page or blog post), we’ll create one with 300 words of content and an image. Same price either way.

Do I get to review the changes before they go live?

Yes. We send you a full report of everything we did. You can review it and approve before publishing, or we can push it live if you want us to handle it.

Can I use this service multiple times?

Absolutely. This is a one-time service per order, but you can order it again for additional pages. If you need ongoing monthly optimization, ask about our full SEO plans.

Will this make my page rank #1?

On-page optimization is necessary, but it’s not sufficient on its own. You also need backlinks, consistent content, and time. This service gets the page ready to rank. It won’t rank overnight, but it won’t rank at all if the on-page work isn’t done.

How long does it take?

Typically 5-7 business days from order to delivery. You’ll get the report as soon as the work is done.
seo__on-page-optimization-silver.footer_inclusions: Includes full optimization report, title/meta tag rewrites, image alt text, heading structure, broken link fixes, and optional content addition or new page creation.

seo__on-page-optimization-starter.faqs_html:
Common Questions

How long does this take?

Usually 3-5 business days from the time you send the page URL.

Can I get multiple pages done?

Yes. This service is per page. If you need more than one, just order multiple.

Will this get me to the top of Google immediately?

No. On-page optimization sets the foundation. Rankings take time and depend on other factors like backlinks, content quality, and competition. But without proper on-page work, you’re fighting uphill.

Do I need to give you access to my site?

Yes. We’ll need admin or editor access to implement the changes. If you’d rather do it yourself, we can send you the full list of recommended changes and you can apply them manually.

What if I don’t like the new title or meta description?

We’ll revise it. One round of revisions is included.
seo__on-page-optimization-starter.footer_inclusions: Full optimization report showing every change made to your page.

seo__on-page-optimization-value.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What page should I optimize first?

Start with your highest-traffic page or the page you most want to rank. If you’re not sure, pick a service page or product page that gets decent traffic but isn’t ranking as well as it should.

Can I order this for multiple pages?

Yes. This is a per-page service. If you want three pages optimized, order it three times.

Will this make my page rank immediately?

No. On-page optimization is necessary but not sufficient. It gets the page ready to rank, but you still need backlinks and time. Think of this as fixing the foundation so the rest of your SEO work can actually take hold.

What if my page already has meta tags and alt text?

We’ll review what’s there and rewrite anything that’s weak or missing. Most sites have some on-page elements in place, but they’re not optimized. We make them better.

Do I get to review the changes before they go live?

Yes. We’ll send you a report of everything we’re changing. You approve it, then we implement.

How long does this take?

Typically 3-5 business days from order to completion, depending on the page complexity.

Frequently Asked Questions

What happens after I order? I reach out within 24 hours to get started. We launch your campaign on the dashboard, then work through the deliverables as listed. You get weekly and monthly updates on progress.

What’s the difference between Local SEO and National SEO? Local SEO targets customers within a few miles of your business. We use geo-specific keywords, locally relevant content, and local citations to drive foot traffic. National SEO is location-neutral, ideal for e-commerce or nationwide campaigns.

Does SEO work for every type of business? Yes. If you offer a viable product or service, SEO can move your site higher in search results and drive more sales.

What countries do you support? We provide Spanish SEO for businesses across the globe. Supported languages are Spanish and English (North America, UK, Australia).

How long does it take to see results? Good SEO takes time. Most customers start seeing momentum in 3-4 months. Many reach the first page of Google after 6 months.

What tactics do you use to improve rankings? - Keyword Optimization: Exhaustive research to find the best keywords for your business. - Website Optimization: Full cleanup and code upgrades. - Business Profile Development: Active profiles on trusted directories. - Link Portfolio Development: Strategic backlinks on industry sites, news sites, blogs, and articles. - Custom Content Creation: High-quality content to keep your site fresh and at the top of rankings. - Service and Performance Reporting: At-a-glance campaign performance and in-depth work reviews. - Campaign Monitoring: Active monitoring to identify improvement areas.

How are keywords chosen? We research keywords unique to your business based on your products, services, industry, location, and competition. The goal is maximum impact.

How do I know SEO is working? Your BMG dashboard shows every action we take on and off your site. You can track every task, monitor keyword movement, and review overall performance. Weekly and monthly reports keep you updated.

How do I cancel? Services are prepaid monthly. Depending on work completed at cancellation, you may receive a full refund, partial refund, or no refund. Reach out to me directly to cancel.

seo__spanish-starter.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What should I expect after I place an order?

Once your order is placed, we’ll reach out within 24 hours to get things started. We launch your campaign on the dashboard, then work through the deliverables as outlined. You’ll get weekly and monthly updates on progress and any changes needed to improve performance.

What’s the difference between local SEO and national SEO?

National SEO is location-neutral. It’s for websites that generate revenue online or want to reach a wide audience. If you’re running a nationwide or e-commerce campaign, that’s national SEO.

Local SEO targets local search. Your audience is within a few miles of your business location, and your online presence drives foot traffic to a physical establishment. We do this through geo-centric keywords, locally relevant content, citations on local directories, and more.

Does SEO work for every type of business?

Yes. As long as you offer a viable product or service, SEO can move your website higher in search rankings and drive more sales.

How long does it take to see results?

Good SEO takes time. Many customers start to see positive momentum in 3-4 months. Most small business clients reach the first page of Google after 6 months if the right conditions are met.

How are keywords chosen?

The keywords we suggest are unique to your business and based on extensive research. We consider your specific products or services, industry, location, competition, and more. The goal is to find the keywords that will provide the most impact for your business.

How do I know SEO is working?

You get access to a custom reporting dashboard that shows every SEO action performed on and off your website. You can track every action performed, monitor keyword movement, and review overall performance. You also get weekly and monthly updates to review campaign activity and ensure your goals are being achieved.

How do I cancel a subscription?

All services are prepaid. Depending on the amount of work completed at the time of cancellation, you may receive a full refund, a partial refund, no refund, or owe additional fees. To cancel, reach out through your dashboard or contact us directly.

smo__best-deal-plan-20.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is Social Media Marketing?

Using platforms like Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram to promote your business. We create and share content (text, graphics, videos, quotes, polls, etc.) to reach your audience and build your brand.

Who should use this service?

Businesses that want a consistent online presence on social networks and want to show their products or services to people who are actually looking for them.

What happens after I place an order?

We launch the campaign and reach out weekly and monthly with updates on progress and any changes we recommend.

Which platforms can you post to?

Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. You pick two for this plan.

How much does this cost?

Pricing is shown on this page. All plans include dedicated support and full transparency into the work being done.

How do I know this is working?

Your BMG dashboard shows every action we take on your accounts. You can track every post, every response, and monitor overall performance. Weekly and monthly reports are delivered automatically.

Will this guarantee sales and leads?

No. Social media is advertising. We can target the right people at the right time, but we can’t control their buying decisions. The goal is visibility and engagement, not guaranteed sales.

Can I track performance across different profiles?

Yes. Your dashboard shows growth across both platforms: reach, followers, engagement, all in one place.

Do I get access to the campaign you’re running?

Yes. Full transparency. You can see performance anytime on your dashboard.

Can I review posts before they go live?

Yes. You’ll see all posts before publishing starts. Request revisions before the cycle begins. Posts approved late may not make it into the scheduled rotation.

Do you need my personal Facebook password?

No. We request access to your Facebook page directly. We never ask for your personal profile credentials.

How do I cancel?

Reach out through your dashboard or contact us directly. Depending on how much work has been completed, you may receive a full refund, partial refund, or owe additional fees for work in progress.

smo__exclusive-business-posts-premium-pl.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What platforms are these posts for?

Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, wherever you’re active. The format works across all of them. If you need platform-specific adjustments (like Instagram captions vs. LinkedIn formatting), just let me know.

Do I have to use all 10 posts every month?

You get 10 per month. If you don’t use them all, they don’t roll over. But most clients find 10 posts per month is about the right cadence to stay visible without overwhelming their audience.

Can I request specific topics or themes?

Yes. That’s the whole point. You tell me what you want to highlight, new products, services, promotions, customer stories, and I write to that. If you don’t have specific requests, I’ll work with what you’ve got and suggest topics.

Who writes the posts?

I handle the copywriting. You review and approve everything before it goes live.

What if I need changes to a post?

Just tell me. Revisions are included. I’ll adjust the copy until it’s right.

Do you post them for me, or do I post them myself?

Either way works. I can schedule them for you, or you can take the approved content and post it yourself. Your call.

What if I need more than 10 posts in a month?

Let me know. We can add more posts or adjust the plan as needed.

smo__facebook-ads-basic-new.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is Social Media Marketing?

Social Media Marketing is the use of platforms like Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram to promote a product or service. It involves creating and sharing content to achieve your marketing and branding goals. Content could be text, graphics, videos, quotes, facts, polls, etc.

Who should use this service?

Businesses that want to improve their online presence on social networks and show their products or services to people who are looking for them. It increases the chance of targeting the right customers at the right time.

What should I expect after I place an order?

Once your order is placed, I’ll reach out within 24 business hours. We’ll launch the campaign and send you weekly and monthly updates on progress and any changes needed to improve performance.

Which social profiles can you connect and post to?

Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn. From one place, you can publish content to multiple social sites with the push of a button.

How much does Social Media cost?

We offer four different packages to fit different needs and budgets. All packages include dedicated support and full transparency into the work being performed. Monthly pricing. The pricing sheet provides complete details on tasks included in each package.

How do I know the campaign is working?

You get total transparency. You’ll have access to a custom reporting dashboard that shows every action performed on your social accounts. You can track every task completed and monitor overall performance. Weekly and monthly updates review campaign activity and performance.

Will it guarantee sales and leads?

No. Like any advertising, social media can never guarantee sure sales or customers. Once content is posted, we can’t control the decision of your potential customers. We target the right people at the right time. The rest is up to them.

We also offer a Twitter lead generation tool to find customers talking about your services in your area. Set up searches for keywords related to your business and watch the leads roll in.

Can performance be tracked across different profiles?

Yes. Show growth across channels from one dashboard. Monitor changes in Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and Instagram reach. See the growth in fans and followers from social campaigns.

Do I have access to the campaign you create?

Yes. We offer transparency so you can see the performance of the campaign anytime you want on the dashboard.

Can I check all posts before they get published?

Yes, you’ll be able to see all posts before publishing starts. Request revisions before the cycle starts. Posts approved beyond their scheduled publishing date may not be published.

Do I need to provide my Facebook password?

No. We don’t require the username and password of your personal profile. We simply request access to your Facebook page, which doesn’t require your credentials. Logging into other users’ profiles is highly discouraged since it can cause the profile to be locked.

How do I cancel?

All services are prepaid subscription basis. Depending on the amount of work completed at the time of cancellation, this may mean receiving a full refund, a partial refund, no refund, or owing additional fees. Reach out to me or our support team to cancel.

special-offers__trinity-marketing-plan.faqs_html:
Frequently Asked Questions

What if I want to target more than one keyword topic?
The Trinity Plan covers 1 keyword topic with 5 primary targets. If your business has multiple service lines or product categories that need their own SEO work, we can scale up with additional keyword topics as an add-on.

Can I change the target keywords after we start?
Yes. If you want to shift focus (seasonality, new product launch, etc.), we can adjust the keyword targets. Just run it by me first so we can make sure the pivot makes sense.

Do I get to approve the social media posts before they go live?
Yes. We can set up an approval workflow if you want to review posts before they publish. Or we can run them on autopilot if you’d rather not be in the weeds.

What platforms should I pick for social media?
Depends on your audience. B2B service businesses usually do well on LinkedIn. Retail, food, hospitality tend to do better on Facebook and Instagram. I’ll give you a recommendation based on your business.

What happens if I need to pause the Google Ads spend?
You can pause the ad spend anytime. The management fee stays active if you want us to keep the account ready to turn back on. If you want to pause everything, just let me know.

How do I see the results?
You’ll get weekly and monthly reports for PPC and social. You also have dashboard access where you can see live data anytime. If you want to hop on a call to walk through the numbers, just ask.
special-offers__trinity-marketing-plan.deliverables_month_1:
Month 1 Deliverables

  • Site audit and intake (website, online presence, audience, goals)
  • Keyword research and target keyword approval (1 keyword topic, 5 primary targets, 25 tracked keywords)
  • Google Ads campaign setup (Search Network, basic conversion tracking)
  • Social media account setup and management on 3 selected platforms (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, or Instagram)
  • 12 social media posts (4 posts per platform)
  • Weekly PPC reports
  • Weekly social media status reports
  • Monthly PPC performance report
  • Monthly social media performance report
  • Access to social media dashboard
